description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage using the ubuntu:trusty Docker image. In the build:ubuntu:trusty:gcc-6 job run a before_script that updates apt, installs software-properties-common, adds the ubuntu-toolchain-r/test PPA, and installs wget, git, build-essential, gcc-6 and g++-6, then execute the shared .build_template script which creates a _build directory, cd into it, conditionally installs CMake 3.11.0 on Linux (download, chmod, run installer, add to PATH) or updates CMake via Homebrew on macOS, runs cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON -DOPTION_SELF_CONTAINED=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=./asap-install .., builds with make -j 2, installs with make install, and runs ctest -C $BUILD_TYPE --output-on-failure. Set CI variables BUILD_TYPE=Release and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY=recursive, and set CC=gcc-6 and CXX=g++-6 for this job.
